title: i18n System
description: Comprehensive guide to internationalization architecture. Includes automatic key typing, translation completeness checks, and dynamic resource loading.
benefit_text: Total type safety — the project will not compile if a key is missing or translation structures differ across languages.

infra_key.title: i18nKey Wrapper
infra_key.description: Identity function for typing string keys. Provides IDE autocompletion for a specific Namespace.

infra_types.title: Type Magic
infra_types.description: Recursive JSON object traversal via <one>TNestedKeyOf</one> to generate dot-notated key paths.

config_hub.title: Resource Registry
config_hub.description: In <one>i18n.config.ts</one>, we import reference JSON files and create a master type <two>TResources</two>.

config_blocks.title: Translation Blocks
config_blocks.description: Configuring physical file locations and dynamic chunk loading in <one>i18n.blocks.ts</one>.

init_core.title: i18next Initialization
init_core.description: Binding plugins and configuration into a single library instance in <one>i18n.init.ts</one>.

init_checker.title: Consistency Control
init_checker.description: Static check in <one>i18n.checker.ts</one>. Guarantees that all languages have an identical key structure.

usage.title: UI Usage
usage.description: Parameterized <one>useTranslation</one> hook and the <two>Trans</two> component for working with dynamic content.

switching.title: Language Switching
switching.description: The <one>changeLanguage</one> utility for synchronous library state and <one>localStorage</one> updates.

config.label: Configuration:
config.text: All settings are centralized in <one>shared/config/i18n</one>/. Each aspect (types, initialization, blocks) is separated into its own file.

locales.label: Translation Files:
locales.text: Located in <one>public/locales/[lng]</one>/. Use nested folders to group namespaces (e.g., <two>booking/order.json</two>).
